title: Disable sanitize when saving events category description
content:
<?php

// 1. Disable sanitization for term descriptions
foreach ( array( 'pre_term_description' ) as $filter ) {
    remove_filter( $filter, 'wp_filter_kses' );
}

// 2. Disable sanitization specifically for the 'description' field of a term
foreach ( array( 'term_description' ) as $filter ) {
    remove_filter( $filter, 'wp_filter_kses' );
}

// 3. Optional: If you want to allow HTML in the display as well
remove_filter( 'term_description', 'wp_kses_data' );

title: Untitled
content:
PS C:\Users\davdunc\OneDrive\Documents\Game_Plan> fabric --pattern extract_wisdom -y https://youtu.be/pmFHX-Wymvc
### SUMMARY
Market analysts Tom and Mike discuss stock highs amid low consumer sentiment, AI rallies, geopolitical risks, and trading setups.

### IDEAS
- NASDAQ gained 16% in 16 days, first since dotcom bubble burst.[1]
- Semiconductor index shifted from panic selling to record buying.[2]
- Crowd piling into tech stocks at higher prices signals warning.[3]
- Consumer sentiment hit lowest record, off the charts bad.[4]
- S&P 500 tech sector on longest winning streak since 1998.[5]
- Mag 7 earnings from Microsoft, Alphabet next week pressure.[6]
- Tesla beat earnings, revenue, crushed free cash flow estimates.
- Trump extended ceasefire, positive for stocks despite Iran attacks.
- Iran threatened Middle East internet via undersea cables map.
- Amazon, Microsoft, Google data centers vulnerable to Iran.
- Fertilizer prices doubled since January, food costs rising.
- SPY 0.17% from all-time high of 712.38, key resistance.
- Cannabis stocks surge on marijuana reclassification to schedule 3.
- MSOS ETF could rally 41% to $7.25 on good news.
- CCL Carnival weakening due to rising oil hurting cruises.
- Nvidia up 20.4%, broke 1780 peak, targets $20 sell wall.
- Bookmap shows stacked sellers at key levels for exits.
- XLE energy upside from Strait of Hormuz closure crunch.
- SMR small modular reactors power AI data centers future.
- FCEL Fuel Cell big money $1.5M calls, break $12 upside.
- CRML Critical Metals targeting $12 breakout continuation.
- Airlines like UAL downside if breaks below 90 level.
- BILI Chinese YouTube uptrending, Trump-Xi meeting catalyst.
- Long-term BILI calls expire 2028, sniping support lows.
- Adapt quickly to Trump or Iran news changing directions.

### INSIGHTS
- Tech rallies ignore sentiment lows, bubble risks loom large.[1]
- Geopolitical tensions amplify beyond oil to food, internet.[2]
- Earnings season tests priced-to-perfection tech valuations.[3]
- Ride AI bubble momentum rather than fight its power.[4]
- Big money trades signal long-term bets on volatility.[5]
- Key levels dictate momentum, supports signal breakdowns.[6]
- Energy shortages from straits boost sector medium-term.
- Cannabis reform unlocks taxes, research, multi-week rallies.
- Adaptability trumps enjoyment in macro-risky markets.
- Discipline with stops essential for volatile stock plays.

### QUOTES
- "Is this real or are we in an AI bubble?" - Speaker[1]
- "Consumer sentiment data came out and it was literally so bad that it was off the chart." - Speaker[2]
- "Tech stocks are being priced to perfection in a very volatile market." - Speaker[3]
- "Iran has actually attacked at least three ships since the extension." - Speaker[4]
- "Food is about to get a lot more expensive." - Speaker[5]
- "You have to enjoy the wave while it's here." - Speaker[6]
- "You have to be quick to adapt because at any moment Trump or Iran can do something." - Speaker
- "I'm not going to really try to fight the bubble. I'm going to try to ride it out." - Speaker
- "These stocks are volatile, so as always, protect yourself. Have stop losses." - Speaker
- "Focus on making smart, disciplined trading decisions above all else." - Speaker
- "Only get into trades that you know why you're getting into." - Speaker
- "If you guys never tried Bookmap, definitely check it out." - Speaker
- "Big tech companies need to power all of this AI data centers." - Speaker
- "Cruise Lines and Airlines are getting hit in the short term." - Speaker
- "Trump is scheduled to meet with the Chinese President Xi on May 14th." - Speaker
- "He better get something good done because if he starts to send the market down with China, that's going to be pretty rough." - Speaker
- "Let's crush it in the market tomorrow." - Speaker
- "SPY is actually only 0.17% away from the recent all-time high." - Speaker
- "Fertilizer prices are surging, having more than doubled since January." - Speaker
- "Tesla has been a bit of a runt of the Mag 7." - Speaker

### HABITS
- Monitor SPY levels daily like 712 resistance, 709 supports.[1]
- Watch Mag 7 earnings reports starting April 29th closely.[2]
- Adapt trading positions quickly to Trump, Iran headlines.[3]
- Use Bookmap tool for stacked buy, sell order visuals.[4]
- Set stop losses on all volatile stock momentum plays.[5]
- Enter trades only knowing exact entry reasons clearly.[6]
- Track big money trades like $655k BILI calls daily.
- Keep radar on sector ETFs such as MSOS, XLE moves.
- Enjoy bullish waves but prepare for macro risk shifts.
- Review intraday price action at key supports like 708.
- Shout out Discord members for profitable trade shares.
- Promote subscribe for daily trading video updates consistently.
- Analyze bookmap sell walls before targeting highs.
- Focus discipline over emotion in all market decisions.
- Check fertilizer, oil impacts on food, cruise stocks.
- Ride bubbles like AI without fighting market momentum.
- Test breakouts above levels like Nvidia 1780 peak.
- Watch cannabis news for multi-week rally potentials.
- Use links for Bookmap discounts in descriptions always.
- Prepare for earnings pressure on tech perfection pricing.

### FACTS
- NASDAQ up 16% in 16 days, first since dotcom bubble.[1]
- Consumer sentiment at lowest reading on record ever.[2]
- Tesla trades at 183 times estimated earnings multiple.[3]
- Iran attacked three ships post-ceasefire extension recently.[4]
- Fertilizer prices doubled since January, up 26% March.[5]
- SPY all-time high at 712.38, double topped overhead.[6]
- Marijuana reclass to schedule 3 from schedule 1 soon.
- MSOS peaked $7.25 last rally, 41% from current close.
- Nvidia broke 1780 peak, 145k shares stacked at $20.
- SMR makes small modular reactors for AI data power.
- BILI calls expire January 21st, 2028 long-term bet.
- Trump-Xi meeting scheduled May 14th-15th in China.
- Strait of Hormuz closed crunching global energy supply.
- Middle East key hotspot for global fertilizer production.
- Tech sector winning streak since 1998 ETF launch longest.
- Iran mapped seven undersea cables as highly vulnerable.
- Tesla beat earnings, revenue, free cash flow estimates.
- Cannabis firms face high taxes now, reform could cut.
- Fuel Cell $1.5M big money into 13 strike calls yesterday.
- Critical Metals, Fuel Cell both target $12 breakout level.

### REFERENCES
- NASDAQ index[1]
- Semiconductor index[2]
- Mag 7: Microsoft, Alphabet, Meta, Amazon, Apple, Tesla[3]
- S&P 500 technology sector ETF[4]
- SPY ETF[5]
- Tesla (TSLA)[6]
- Strait of Hormuz
- Iran undersea cables map
- Amazon, Microsoft, Google data centers
- MSOS cannabis ETF
- Tilray (TLRY)
- CGC (Canopy Growth)
- CCL (Carnival Cruise Lines)
- Nvidia Semiconductor (NVDA)
- Bookmap trading tool
- XLE energy ETF
- SMR small modular reactors
- FCEL (Fuel Cell Energy)
- CRML (Critical Metals)
- UAL (United Airlines)
- BILI (Chinese video platform)
- Stocked Up Discord

### ONE-SENTENCE TAKEAWAY
Ride tech rallies adaptively amid geopolitics, earnings risks.

### RECOMMENDATIONS
- Watch SPY break 712 for bullish momentum confirmation.[1]
- Track Mag 7 earnings April 29th for tech pressure test.[2]
- Use Bookmap to spot sell walls at targets like $20.[3]
- Set stop losses on volatile plays like FCEL, CRML.[4]
- Monitor Iran headlines over economic data this week.[5]
- Ride AI bubble with SMR instead of fighting upside.[6]
- Keep MSOS radar for 41% rally to prior $7.25 peak.
- Adapt fast to Trump-Iran moves changing market direction.
- Short CCL on oil rise hurting cruise line profits.
- Target Nvidia higher if holds above 1780 breakout level.
- Watch XLE upside from energy supply Strait crunch.
- Enter trades knowing precise reasons and risk rewards.
- Follow big money like BILI long calls to 2028.
- Prepare breakdowns to 703 if SPY rejects 712 high.
- Subscribe channel for daily big money, SPY analysis.
- Check Bookmap links for discounts on order visuals.
- Join Discord for short-term trading profit shares.
- Eye UAL downside below 90 on airline sector hit.
- Bet cannabis reform for tax cuts, research doors.
- Focus discipline, protect self in all momentum plays.
- Watch Trump-Xi May 14th for BILI catalyst spark.
- Enjoy bull waves but mind macro risks always present.

# CITATIONS

- [2] https://www.library.hbs.edu/working-knowledge/meaning-of-life-might-be-hidden-in-life-you-already-have
